daze.name: Daze
daze.description: You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage with a basic Will save. On a critical failure, the target is also stunned 1.

detect_magic.name: Detect Magic
detect_magic.description: You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You sense whether any active spells or magic items are within the area. The spell is blocked by lead or 1 foot of iron. If you're within 30 feet of a magical object or effect, you can take a single action to determine its school of magic.

3.description: You learn the specific spells and magical effects in the area, and can pinpoint their locations.

4.description: You learn the source of any magic effects in the area, and you can Seek to pinpoint invisible magical sources.

divine_lance.name: Divine Lance
divine_lance.description: You unleash a lance of holy or unholy power (your choice) at the target. Make a spell attack roll. The lance deals 1d4 spirit damage, plus spirit damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. Choose holy or unholy when you cast the spell; the damage gains that trait.

electric_arc.name: Electric Arc
electric_arc.description: An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

figment.name: Figment
figment.description: You create a simple illusory image of a stationary object, creature, or simple pattern. The image can't be larger than a 5-foot cube. It doesn't create sound, smell, texture, or temperature. Interacting with the image ends the spell.

frostbite.name: Frostbite
frostbite.description: You shoot a ray of biting frost at your target. The target takes 1d4 cold damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also enfeebled 1 until the start of your next turn.

gouging_claw.name: Gouging Claw
gouging_claw.description: You briefly transform your hand into a clawed appendage and make a melee spell attack roll against the target. On a hit, you deal 1d6 slashing damage plus 1d4 persistent bleed damage. On a critical hit, double the slashing damage, and the target takes 2d4 persistent bleed instead.

guidance.name: Guidance
guidance.duration: until the start of your next turn
guidance.description: You channel divine guidance to a creature. The target can call upon this guidance before the spell ends to reroll one Perception check, saving throw, attack roll, or skill check and use the better result. The guidance is lost if not used. You can't cast this on the same creature twice in 10 minutes.

haunting_hymn.name: Haunting Hymn
haunting_hymn.description: You utter a discordant hymn that assaults the minds of those nearby. Each creature in the area takes 2d4 sonic damage with a basic Fortitude save.

ignition.name: Ignition
ignition.description: Flames leap from your fingers. Make a melee or ranged spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 1d4 fire damage. On a ranged hit, the target also takes 1d4 persistent fire damage. On a critical hit (melee), the target takes 1d8 persistent fire damage instead.

know_the_way.name: Know the Way
know_the_way.description: You attune your senses to detect the direction of a specific location, landmark, or area you have visited before. For the duration, you gain a sense of direction and approximate distance to that place, though you don't gain detailed route information.

light.name: Light
light.description: The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet). You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet. If you cast Light again and already have four active lights, the oldest one ends.

4.description: The bright light radius increases to 60 feet (and 60 feet of dim light).

telekinetic_hand.name: Telekinetic Hand
telekinetic_hand.targets: 1 unattended object of light or negligible Bulk
telekinetic_hand.description: You create a magical hand that can manipulate or move an unattended object within range. You can move the object up to 20 feet per action, but you can't move it beyond the spell's range. The hand can't perform actions requiring fine manipulation.

3.description: Range becomes 60 feet. You can move objects up to 1 Bulk.

5.description: Range becomes 120 feet. You can move objects up to 2 Bulk.

7.description: Range becomes 500 feet. You can move objects up to 5 Bulk.

message.name: Message
message.description: You mouth words quietly, transmitting a magical message to the target. The target hears the message in their mind. The target can respond with a short message immediately. Creatures other than the target can't hear either message.

needle_darts.name: Needle Darts
needle_darts.description: You conjure three sharp needles and fling them at a target. Make a spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 3d4 piercing damage; on a critical hit, the target takes the damage plus 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitation
prestidigitation.description: The simplest magic does your bidding. Choose one of the following effects: Cook (alter food's temperature or flavor), Lift (move a light object 1 foot), Make (create a temporary crude object), or Tidy (clean or soil an object or creature). The spell can't deal damage or have a significant effect.

read_aura.name: Read Aura
read_aura.description: Delving into the target's magical aura, you detect the magical school associated with the target. If the target has the magical trait, you learn the magical tradition of that trait and the approximate power of the aura.

2.description: You learn the target's precise aura strength and the school of magic affecting it.

6.description: You can target any creature within range and learn all active spells affecting it.

scatter_scree.name: Scatter Scree
scatter_scree.description: You hurl a shower of rocks and debris. Each creature in the area takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save. The area becomes difficult terrain until cleared.

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: You raise a magical shield of force. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. You can use Shield Block as a reaction while this spell is active. The shield has Hardness 5 and can block up to 5 damage.

3.description: The shield's Hardness increases to 10 and it can block up to 10 damage.

sigil.name: Sigil
sigil.description: You inscribe a magical sigil on the target. The sigil is invisible but can be detected with detect magic or read aura. You can create a different symbol for each casting. You can use sigil as a free action when you Cast a Spell if you also use it to tag a target of that spell.

slashing_gust.name: Slashing Gust
slashing_gust.description: You direct a blast of sharp wind at a target. The target takes 1d4 slashing damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, the target is pushed 10 feet away from you.

stabilize.name: Stabilize
stabilize.description: Positive energy shudders through the target, knitting its wounds just enough to keep it alive. The target loses the dying condition, though it remains unconscious at 0 Hit Points.

tangle_vine.name: Tangle Vine
tangle_vine.description: A vine lashes out to entangle your target. Make a spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speed for 1 round. On a critical hit, the target is also flat-footed until the end of your next turn.

telekinetic_projectile.name: Telekinetic Projectile
telekinetic_projectile.description: You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and not more than 1 Bulk at the target. Make a spell attack roll. On a hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage (based on the object) equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

vitality_lash.name: Vitality Lash
vitality_lash.description: You lash out with a tendril of vitality energy. Undead targets take 1d4 vitality damage with a basic Fortitude save. Living targets gain no benefit (the energy is tuned for undead). If you target a living creature, the spell has no effect.

void_warp.name: Void Warp
void_warp.description: You warp the target with void energy, sapping its vitality. The target takes 1d4 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also enfeebled 1 until the start of your next turn.

alarm.name: Alarm
alarm.description: You ward an area against intrusion. When you cast the spell, you designate up to 8 creatures that don't trigger the alarm. The first time a Small or larger creature enters the area without your permission, the alarm is triggered. You can choose a mental alarm (only you hear it) or an audible alarm (a loud bell all creatures nearby can hear).

bane.name: Bane
bane.description: You fill the minds of your enemies with doubt. Each enemy in the area must succeed at a Will save or take a –1 status penalty to attack rolls. On a critical failure, the creature takes a –2 status penalty instead.

bless.name: Bless
bless.description: You bolster your allies' morale. Each ally in the area gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls. Each round, you can Sustain the spell to extend the emanation by 5 feet.

breathe_fire.name: Breathe Fire
breathe_fire.description: You exhale a blast of flame. Each creature in the area takes 2d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save.

charm.name: Charm
charm.description: You take hold of the target's mind and make it view you as a friend. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target has the friendly condition toward you (or helpful on a critical failure) for the duration.

4.description: Range increases to 120 feet, and duration increases to 1 day.

8.description: Range 120 feet, duration 1 month, targets up to 10 creatures.

dizzying_colors.name: Dizzying Colors
dizzying_colors.description: Brilliant light cascades from your hands. Each creature in the area is subject to an effect depending on its Will save result. On a failure, the creature is dazzled for 1 round. On a critical failure, it is blinded for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute.

5.description: The area increases to a 30-foot cone.

command.name: Command
command.duration: until end of target's next turn
command.description: You shout a command, compelling the target to obey. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target must immediately spend its next action to follow your command (approach, drop, fall, flee, halt, release, or stop).

5.description: You can target up to 10 creatures.

create_water.name: Create Water
create_water.description: You conjure 2 gallons of pure water out of thin air. The water can appear in an open container or pour onto the ground.

enfeeble.name: Enfeeble
enfeeble.description: You sap the target's strength. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is enfeebled 3 for 1 minute.

entangling_flora.name: Entangling Flora
entangling_flora.description: Vines, roots, and undergrowth spring up in the area, grabbing and restraining creatures. Each creature in the area when the spell is cast must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, the creature is immobilized. On a critical failure, the creature is also grabbed. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration.

fear.name: Fear
fear.description: You plant fear into the target's mind. The target must attempt a Will save. On a success, the target is unaffected. On a failure, the target is frightened 2. On a critical failure, the target is frightened 3 and fleeing for 1 round.

3.description: Targets up to 5 creatures in a 30-foot burst.

gentle_landing.name: Gentle Landing
gentle_landing.description: You cause the target to fall slowly, at a rate of 60 feet per round. The target takes no damage from falling and lands on its feet. You can cast this spell as a reaction triggered when a creature within range begins to fall.

fleet_step.name: Fleet Step
fleet_step.description: You enhance your movement, increasing your Speed by 10 feet for the duration.

force_barrage.name: Force Barrage
force_barrage.description: You fire shards of solidified magic force. You can fire one, two, or three shards based on the number of actions spent. Each shard automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. You can direct the shards at the same target or different ones.

goblin_pox.name: Goblin Pox
goblin_pox.description: You afflict the target with virulent goblin pox. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is sickened 1. On a critical failure, the target is sickened 2 and slowed 1 for 1 round.

grease.name: Grease
grease.area: 4 contiguous squares on a flat surface
grease.description: You conjure a puddle of grease in the target area. Each creature standing in the area must attempt a Reflex save or fall prone. The area is difficult terrain and creatures entering must also save or fall prone.

grim_tendrils.name: Grim Tendrils
grim_tendrils.description: Tendrils of darkness curl outward from your fingers. Each living creature in the area takes 2d4 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. Creatures that fail also take 1 persistent void damage.

gust_of_wind.name: Gust of Wind
gust_of_wind.description: A violent blast of wind rushes forward in a line. Each creature in the area must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is pushed 30 feet away from you and knocked prone. Small or smaller creatures that fail are pushed 60 feet instead.

harm.name: Harm
harm.description: You channel void energy to harm the living or heal the undead. 1 action (touch): deal 1d8+modifier void damage or restore HP to one undead. 2 actions (30-foot range): same but ranged. 3 actions (30-foot burst): affect all living and undead in area.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: You channel vitality energy to heal the living or harm the undead. 1 action (touch): restore 1d8+modifier HP to a living creature or deal that much vitality damage to undead. 2 actions (30-foot range): same but ranged. 3 actions (30-foot burst): restore 1d8 HP to all living and deal that to undead in area.

hydraulic_push.name: Hydraulic Push
hydraulic_push.description: You call forth a powerful blast of water that bludgeons the target and knocks it back. The target takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is also pushed 5 feet (10 feet on a critical failure).

illusory_disguise.name: Illusory Disguise
illusory_disguise.description: You create a visual illusion that makes you look like a specific individual. The disguise includes clothing and accoutrements. Creatures can attempt a Perception check against your spell DC to disbelieve.

2.description: The spell also disguises your voice and smell.

3.description: The spell also disguises your aura.

illusory_object.name: Illusory Object
illusory_object.description: You create an illusory image of an object, a creature, or a phenomenon. The illusion is purely visual and can fill an area up to 20 feet in every direction. Creatures that investigate the illusion can attempt a Perception check against your spell DC to disbelieve it.

item_facade.name: Item Facade
item_facade.description: You make an object look different. You can make it look like another object of similar size and shape, or appear undamaged. Creatures can see through the illusion with a Perception check against your spell DC.

jump.name: Jump
jump.description: You propel yourself through the air. You jump up to 30 feet in any direction without triggering reactions based on movement. You still fall at the end of the jump if not on solid ground.

5.description: You can fly up to 60 feet as part of the jump.

lock.name: Lock
lock.targets: 1 lock, or a door or container with a latch
lock.description: You magically lock the target. The DC to pick the lock or Force the target Open increases by 4. Once each day, you can unlock the target for 10 minutes by using your hand to make an unlocking gesture near it.

tailwind.name: Tailwind
tailwind.description: You lengthen your stride, increasing your Speed by 10 feet for the duration.

3.description: You can target 1 willing creature within 30 feet.

mystic_armor.name: Mystic Armor
mystic_armor.description: You ward yourself with magical energy, granting a +1 item bonus to AC and a maximum Dexterity modifier of 5.

6.description: +2 item bonus to AC and saving throws.

8.description: +3 item bonus to AC and saving throws.

10.description: +4 item bonus to AC and saving throws.

phantom_pain.name: Phantom Pain
phantom_pain.description: Illusory pain wracks the target. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target takes 2d4 mental damage and is sickened 1. On a critical failure, the target takes 4d4 mental damage and is sickened 2.

protection.name: Protection
protection.description: You create a protective barrier around the target, granting it a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws against attacks and effects from hostile creatures.

pummel.name: Pummel
pummel.description: You deliver a crushing magical blow. The target takes 2d10 bludgeoning damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also knocked prone.

runic_weapon.name: Runic Weapon
runic_weapon.description: You inscribe runes of power onto a weapon, making it temporarily magical. The weapon becomes a +1 striking weapon for the duration, gaining a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and dealing one extra weapon damage die.

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: You ward the target with protective magic. Creatures that attempt to attack the target must succeed at a Will save against your spell DC or they can't attack the target. The spell ends if the target uses a hostile action.

thunderstrike.name: Thunderstrike
thunderstrike.description: You unleash a powerful electrical charge with your touch. Make a melee spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 2d12 electricity damage. If the target is wearing metal armor or is primarily made of metal, it also takes 1d4 persistent electricity damage.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: You cloud the minds of creatures in the area. Each creature must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the creature is slowed 1 and fatigued. On a critical failure, the creature falls unconscious. The spell ends for a creature that takes damage.

4.description: The area increases to a 10-foot burst.

9.description: Creatures that fail are knocked unconscious until woken.

soothe.name: Soothe
soothe.description: You flood the target's mind with calming thoughts. The target regains 1d10+4 HP and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against emotion and fear effects for the duration.

spider_sting.name: Spider Sting
spider_sting.description: You mimic a spider's venomous bite with a melee touch attack. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target takes 1d4 poison damage and is enfeebled 1 for 1 round. On a critical failure, the target takes 2d4 poison damage and is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute.

summon_animal.name: Summon Animal
summon_animal.description: You conjure an animal to fight alongside you. You summon an animal of CR 1/4 or lower. The summoned animal follows your commands. Each round you can Sustain the spell to command the animal to act.

2.description: Summon an animal of CR 1/2 or lower.

3.description: Summon an animal of CR 1 or lower.

4.description: Summon an animal of CR 2 or lower.

5.description: Summon an animal of CR 3 or lower.

6.description: Summon an animal of CR 4 or lower.

7.description: Summon an animal of CR 5 or lower.

8.description: Summon an animal of CR 6 or lower.

9.description: Summon an animal of CR 7 or lower.

10.description: Summon an animal of CR 8 or lower.

sure_strike.name: Sure Strike
sure_strike.description: A stroke of fortune ensures your next blow lands true. You roll twice on your next attack roll and take the higher result.

ventriloquism.name: Ventriloquism
ventriloquism.description: Your voice seems to come from somewhere else. You can make your voice appear to come from any location or source you can see within 60 feet. Anyone who hears the voice can attempt a Perception check against your spell DC to realize it is illusory.

acid_grip.name: Acid Grip
acid_grip.description: You fire an arrow of acid that deals 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage on a hit. On a critical hit, double the initial damage and the persistent damage increases to 2d6.

animal_messenger.name: Animal Messenger
animal_messenger.description: You compel a Tiny animal to carry a message to a location or creature you describe. The animal travels to the destination by the most direct route, ignoring terrain hazards. When it arrives, it waits up to 1 hour for the recipient. It returns to you after delivering the message if given a reply.

oaken_resilience.name: Oaken Resilience
oaken_resilience.description: The target's skin toughens and becomes bark-like. The target gains a +2 status bonus to its AC and a +2 status bonus to saving throws against physical damage while the spell is in effect.

blazing_bolt.name: Blazing Bolt
blazing_bolt.description: You shoot a bolt of fire at a creature. Make a ranged spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage. For each additional action spent, you fire one more bolt at the same or a different target.

blur.name: Blur
blur.description: The target's form blurs and wavers, making it harder to strike. The target becomes concealed (attackers must succeed at a DC 5 flat check). This does not make the target undetected.

calm.name: Calm
calm.description: You force calm upon the minds of creatures in the area. Each creature must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the creature is calmed and can't use hostile actions for the duration. Any hostile action ends the effect on that creature.

translate.name: Translate
translate.description: The target can understand all languages it hears or reads for the duration, though it can't speak or write additional languages. The target must be able to hear or see the language to understand it.

everlight.name: Everlight
everlight.description: A magical flame, equivalent in brightness to a torch, springs forth from an object. The flame looks like a regular flame but creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. The flame lasts indefinitely until the spell is dismissed.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description: You create a shroud of darkness that extinguishes all mundane light and even suppresses magical light of your spell rank or lower within the area. Creatures in the area have the blinded condition unless they have darkvision.

4.description: You can sustain the spell for up to 1 hour.

darkvision.name: Darkvision
darkvision.description: You grant the target the ability to see in darkness for the duration. The target gains darkvision, allowing it to see in darkness as clearly as in dim light.

deafness.name: Deafness
deafness.description: You deafen the target. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is deafened for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is deafened permanently until healed.

dispel_magic.name: Dispel Magic
dispel_magic.targets: 1 spell effect or unattended magic item
dispel_magic.description: You unravel the magic in a spell effect or magic item. Make a counteract check. On a success, the spell effect ends or the magic item becomes nonmagical for 10 minutes. The DC is 14 + the spell rank or item level.

enlarge.name: Enlarge
enlarge.description: You increase the target's size by one category (typically from Medium to Large). The target gains a +2 status bonus to melee damage rolls and its reach increases by 5 feet. Weapons and carried items also grow.

4.description: You can target up to 10 willing creatures.

revealing_light.name: Revealing Light
revealing_light.description: Colorful light coats the creatures and objects in the area, causing them to outline in a glowing aura. Affected creatures become visible and can't benefit from concealment or invisibility. They shed dim light in a 10-foot radius.

false_vitality.name: False Vitality
false_vitality.description: You gain 1d8+4 temporary Hit Points. These temporary HP last until the spell ends or until they are spent.

peaceful_rest.name: Peaceful Rest
peaceful_rest.description: You preserve a corpse in its current state, preventing it from decaying or becoming undead. If the creature died within the last 3 days and could be resurrected, the spell extends the time limit by the spell's duration.

ghoulish_cravings.name: Ghoulish Cravings
ghoulish_cravings.description: You afflict the target with the desire to consume flesh. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is slowed 1 and takes 2d6 void damage per round unless it uses an action to bite a creature adjacent to it. On a critical failure, the target is also paralyzed for 1 round.

glitterdust.name: Glitterdust
glitterdust.description: A cloud of golden particles covers the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, the creature is blinded for 1 round and outlined in glittering light, negating concealment. On a critical failure, the creature is blinded for 1 minute.

laughing_fit.name: Laughing Fit
laughing_fit.description: The target is overcome with uncontrollable laughter. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target falls prone and is incapacitated for 1 round. On a critical failure, the target continues to be incapacitated for the full duration.

humanoid_form.name: Humanoid Form
humanoid_form.description: You transform into a specific Medium humanoid of a common ancestry. You retain your statistics but gain the physical appearance of the chosen ancestry. You can mimic a specific individual's appearance, though observers can attempt Perception checks against your spell DC to see through the disguise.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: The target becomes invisible. The target is undetected to creatures without special senses. The spell ends if the target makes an attack or uses a hostile action.

4.description: The invisibility doesn't end when the target uses hostile actions.

knock.name: Knock
knock.description: You attempt to open the target. Make a counteract check against the lock's Thievery DC or against the spell's DC if the target is magically sealed. On a success, the target is unlocked and opens. A loud knock sounds when you cast this spell.

mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.description: Three illusory duplicates of you appear around you. Each time a creature targets you with a Strike, roll a d4; on a 1, 2, or 3, the attack targets a duplicate instead (the duplicate is destroyed). When all duplicates are gone, the spell ends.

noise_blast.name: Noise Blast
noise_blast.description: You unleash a powerful burst of sound. Each creature in the area takes 2d10 sonic damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the creature is also deafened for 1 minute.

paralyze.name: Paralyze
paralyze.description: You paralyze the target with a mental bolt. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical failure, the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. On a failure, the target is paralyzed for 1 round. On a success, the target is stunned 1.

7.description: You can target up to 10 creatures.

resist_energy.name: Resist Energy
resist_energy.description: You grant the target resistance 5 to one energy type you choose when casting (acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic).

restoration.name: Restoration
restoration.description: You accelerate the target's natural healing. The target recovers from the clumsy, enfeebled, and stupefied conditions, and gains 1d8 HP per spell rank. Additionally, the spell can remove one poison or disease of your spell rank or lower.

see_the_unseen.name: See the Unseen
see_the_unseen.description: The target can see invisible creatures and objects. Invisible creatures are visible to the target but still have the concealed condition.

5.description: The target can also see into the ethereal plane.

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.targets: 1 object or creature made of crystal, glass, or similar brittle material
shatter.description: You shatter the target with a resonant magical frequency. The target takes 4d8 sonic damage with a basic Fortitude save. Objects take double damage and automatically fail their save.

shrink.name: Shrink
shrink.description: You decrease the target's size by one category (typically from Medium to Small). The target takes a –2 status penalty to melee damage rolls and can Squeeze through tight spaces more easily. The target's gear changes size with it.

4.description: You can target up to 10 willing creatures.

silence.name: Silence
silence.description: The target can't make sounds. Spells with the auditory or linguistic traits have no effect on the target if they require the target to hear them. Creatures within 20 feet of the target can't be heard.

slow.name: Slow
slow.description: You slow the target's actions. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is slowed 1 for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is slowed 2 for 1 minute.

7.description: You can target up to 10 creatures.

spiritual_armament.name: Spiritual Armament
spiritual_armament.description: A ghostly weapon appears and attacks foes. When you cast the spell, and each time you Sustain it, the weapon flies to a target within range and makes a Strike using your spell attack modifier. The weapon deals 1d8 force damage plus your spellcasting modifier.

telekinetic_maneuver.name: Telekinetic Maneuver
telekinetic_maneuver.description: You grab or trip a foe at a distance using telekinesis. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's Fortitude DC. On a hit, you Trip or Disarm the target (your choice). On a critical hit, the target is knocked prone (Trip) or the item is sent flying 10 feet (Disarm).

vomit_swarm.name: Vomit Swarm
vomit_swarm.description: You vomit forth a swarm of insects, vermin, or other creatures. Each creature in the area takes 2d8 piercing damage with a basic Reflex save.

water_breathing.name: Water Breathing
water_breathing.description: The targets can breathe water as easily as they breathe air. They don't lose their ability to breathe air.

web.name: Web
web.description: You create a mass of sticky webs. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, the creature is grabbed. On a critical failure, the creature is immobilized. The area becomes difficult terrain.

bind_undead.name: Bind Undead
bind_undead.description: You take control of an undead creature. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target becomes controlled by you for the duration. On a critical failure, the target is also stunned 1. On a success, the target is unaffected.

blindness.name: Blindness
blindness.description: You blind the target. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a critical success, the target is unaffected. On a success, the target is dazzled for 1 round. On a failure, the target is blinded for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is permanently blinded.

circle_of_protection.name: Circle of Protection
circle_of_protection.description: You designate an alignment (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful) when you cast this spell. The circle grants all creatures within it a +1 status bonus to AC and saves against attacks, spells, and abilities used by creatures of the designated alignment. Creatures of that alignment in the area are also repelled, taking a -4 status penalty to attack rolls targeting creatures in the circle.

crashing_wave.name: Crashing Wave
crashing_wave.description: You send a crashing wave of water crashing into your foes. Each creature in the area takes 4d8 bludgeoning damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is also knocked back 10 feet.

dream_message.name: Dream Message
dream_message.description: You send a message to a sleeping creature anywhere on the same plane. The message can be up to 1 minute long, and the target experiences it as a dream. The target remembers the message clearly when they awaken. If the target is magically prevented from sleeping, the spell fails.

earthbind.name: Earthbind
earthbind.description: You drag a creature down with the force of gravity. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target loses its fly speed and falls safely to the ground (as if under feather fall) for 1 round. On a critical failure, the target is also stunned 1.

enthrall.name: Enthrall
enthrall.description: Your words captivate all creatures in the area who can hear you. Each creature must attempt a Will save when you cast the spell. On a failure, the target is fascinated with you and can't use reactions. The effect ends if you or your allies attack the target.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: A roaring blast of fire appears at a spot you designate, dealing 6d6 fire damage to every creature in the area.

fly.name: Fly
fly.description: The target gains a fly speed of 30 feet.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: Magic empowers the target to act faster. The target gains the quickened condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike, Stride, or Step.

7.description: You can target up to 6 creatures.

heroism.name: Heroism
heroism.description: You grant the target a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks.

hypercognition.name: Hypercognition
hypercognition.description: You rapidly catalog and collate information. You can instantly recall up to 5 pieces of information you've encountered, and you can attempt up to 5 Recall Knowledge checks at once without any penalties for rushing.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: A bolt of lightning blasts from your hands, dealing 4d12 electricity damage to every creature in the line.

locate.name: Locate
locate.description: You sense the direction and approximate distance of a specific object or creature within 500 feet that you are familiar with, or the nearest object of a particular type (such as stairs or water). The spell doesn't give precise location, only direction and rough distance.

5.description: You can locate any creature or object within 1 mile.

mind_reading.name: Mind Reading
mind_reading.description: You read the target's surface thoughts. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, you learn what the creature is currently thinking about. On a critical failure, you can also ask one question that the creature must answer truthfully (though it doesn't need to volunteer information).

safe_passage.name: Safe Passage
safe_passage.description: You sanctify a corridor of terrain to protect those passing through it. Hazardous terrain within the area becomes normal terrain, and creatures moving through the area don't trigger traps or natural environmental hazards.

anointed_ground.name: Anointed Ground
anointed_ground.description: You hallow the area, choosing an alignment (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful). Creatures of the opposing alignment within the area take a -1 status penalty to all checks and DCs. Undead in the area also take 1d6 spirit damage at the start of each of their turns.

holy_light.name: Holy Light
holy_light.description: You shoot a scorching ray of light at the target. Make a ranged spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 5d6 fire damage. Undead and creatures with weakness to light or good take 5d6 spirit damage instead of or in addition to the fire damage (as appropriate).

stinking_cloud.name: Stinking Cloud
stinking_cloud.description: You create a cloud of nauseating vapors. Each creature in the area when the cloud appears must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is sickened 1. On a critical failure, the creature is sickened 2 and slowed 1 while in the cloud. The cloud is difficult terrain.

vampiric_feast.name: Vampiric Feast
vampiric_feast.description: You drain life force from a creature. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target takes 6d6 negative damage and you gain that many temporary HP (maximum 6d6). On a critical failure, the target takes double damage and you gain double the temporary HP.

wall_of_thorns.name: Wall of Thorns
wall_of_thorns.area: wall up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high
wall_of_thorns.description: You create a wall of thorny brambles. Creatures passing through or starting their turn in the wall take 3d4 piercing damage with a basic Reflex save. The wall is difficult terrain.

wall_of_wind.name: Wall of Wind
wall_of_wind.area: wall up to 60 feet long and 30 feet high
wall_of_wind.description: You create a wall of swirling winds. The wall blocks ranged weapon attacks (except for siege weapons) that pass through it. Creatures passing through the wall must succeed at a Fortitude save or be pushed back 5 feet and become off-guard until the start of their next turn.

wanderers_guide.name: Wanderer's Guide
wanderers_guide.description: You guide the target through unfamiliar terrain. The target gains a +2 status bonus to Survival checks to navigate and can't get lost in natural terrain. The target also automatically knows the direction of north and always knows its approximate location relative to the starting point of the journey.

ring_of_truth.name: Ring of Truth
ring_of_truth.description: You create an aura of magical truth. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the creature can't knowingly speak a lie, though it may decline to speak at all. The effect doesn't prevent vague or misleading statements, only outright lies.

brain_drain.name: Brain Drain
brain_drain.description: You probe a creature's mind, dealing mental damage and gleaning a fragment of its knowledge. The target must attempt a Will save. The spell deals 2d6 mental damage.

counter_performance.name: Counter Performance
counter_performance.duration: until the start of your next turn
counter_performance.description: Your performance protects you and your allies. If you or an ally in the area rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect, you can use your Performance modifier instead of the relevant saving throw modifier.

dazzling_flash.name: Dazzling Flash
dazzling_flash.description: You create a blinding flash of light. Each creature in the area must attempt a Fortitude save or become dazzled for 1 round. On a critical failure, it's blinded for 1 round and then dazzled for 1 minute.

dragon_claws.name: Dragon Claws
dragon_claws.description: Scales and claws sprout from your hands. You gain a claw attack that deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the agile and finesse traits. The claws also deal 1d6 extra damage of the type matching your draconic heritage.

+1.description: The extra damage from your draconic heritage increases by 1d6.

elemental_toss.name: Elemental Toss
elemental_toss.description: You fling a chunk of your elemental matter at a foe. Make a spell attack roll. The attack deals 1d8 damage of the type matching your elemental heritage.

fire_ray.name: Fire Ray
fire_ray.description: A blazing band of fire arcs through the air. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals 2d6 fire damage.

force_bolt.name: Force Bolt
force_bolt.description: You send a small orb of force rocketing toward a creature. The bolt automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage.

gravity_weapon.name: Gravity Weapon
gravity_weapon.duration: until the start of your next turn
gravity_weapon.description: You enhance your weapon with gravitational force. Your next Strike with a weapon or unarmed attack before the end of your turn deals an extra 1d6 bludgeoning damage.

hand_of_the_apprentice.name: Hand of the Apprentice
hand_of_the_apprentice.description: You hurl your melee weapon at your target with the power of your mind. Make a spell attack roll against the target's AC; you can add your Intelligence modifier to the attack roll instead of your Strength or Dexterity modifier. On a hit, the weapon deals its normal damage.

courageous_anthem.name: Courageous Anthem
courageous_anthem.description: You inspire your allies with words or tunes of encouragement. You and all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saves against fear effects.

rallying_anthem.name: Rallying Anthem
rallying_anthem.description: You inspire your allies to protect themselves more effectively. You and all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws.

qi_rush.name: Qi Rush
qi_rush.duration: until the start of your next turn
qi_rush.description: You move with extraordinary speed and agility. You Stride up to double your Speed. You can move through the spaces of enemies during this movement. Until the start of your next turn, you gain a +2 status bonus to AC.

inner_upheaval.name: Inner Upheaval
inner_upheaval.description: You focus your ki into a powerful strike. Make an unarmed Strike. On a hit, the Strike deals 1d6 extra damage; the damage type is your choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing.

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.description: Your hands become infused with positive energy, healing a living creature's wounds when you touch them. The target regains 6 Hit Points.

+1.description: The amount of healing increases by 6.

soul_siphon.name: Soul Siphon
soul_siphon.description: You draw out some of the target's life force. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, it takes 2d6 void damage and you regain the same number of Hit Points.

tempest_surge.name: Tempest Surge
tempest_surge.description: You surround a foe in a swirling storm of violent winds, shocking lightning, and pelting rain. The target must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes 1d12 electricity damage and is clumsy 2 for 1 round.

untamed_shift.name: Untamed Shift
untamed_shift.description: You partially transform your body, choosing one of these effects: your hands transform into claws dealing 1d6 slashing damage, you grow jaws that deal 1d8 piercing damage, or you grow a tail that you can use to Shove an adjacent creature.

untamed_form.name: Untamed Form
untamed_form.description: You call upon primal power to transform yourself into a battle form. You choose from the following: pest form (Tiny animal, Speed 30 feet), insect form (Small insect, Speed 30 feet, fly Speed 30 feet), or the statistics of a 1st-level animal you have seen.

cleanse_affliction.name: Cleanse Affliction
cleanse_affliction.description: Your divine power purges the target's illness or toxin. Attempt a counteract check against one poison or disease afflicting the target. On a success, you counteract the affliction.

aerial_form.name: Aerial Form
aerial_form.description: You transform into a Medium bat, bird, or wasp battle form. You gain AC 21, attack modifier +13, and a fly Speed of 60 feet. You gain a primary attack with the statistics of the chosen form. While in this form you can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the concentrate trait except to Sustain a Spell.

5.description: You can become Large size and gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls in addition to the other benefits.

air_walk.name: Air Walk
air_walk.description: The target can walk on air as if it were solid ground. The target can ascend and descend at a 45-degree angle. The target can't use this ability to fly faster than its normal Speed.

blight.name: Blight
blight.description: You poison all plant life in the area. Plant creatures in the area take 6d8 poison damage with a basic Fortitude save. Non-creature plants wither and die. The spell has no effect in areas without plant life.

clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
clairvoyance.description: You create an invisible floating eye at a location you can see within range. You can see from that eye's perspective as if you were standing there, and you can look in any direction. You can Sustain the spell to move the eye up to 30 feet.

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.description: You befuddle the target's mind with a mental assault. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target is confused for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target is confused for 1 minute and must immediately spend its reaction to attack its nearest ally.

8.description: You can target up to 10 creatures.

creation.name: Creation
creation.description: You conjure a temporary object of nonliving matter up to 5 cubic feet in volume. The object can have moving parts but can't be a magic item or contain precious materials worth more than 1 gp. The object is clearly artificial.

detect_scrying.name: Detect Scrying
detect_scrying.description: You detect all active scrying sensors in the area. You sense the presence of any active scrying spell or similar magical sensor in the emanation, and can attempt to identify the scrying magic with a Recall Knowledge check.

divine_wrath.name: Divine Wrath
divine_wrath.description: You pour divine wrath down upon your foes. Choose an alignment your deity has (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful). Creatures in the area that have the opposing alignment take 4d10 spirit damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a failure, they're also sickened 1. On a critical failure, they're sickened 2 instead.

fire_shield.name: Fire Shield
fire_shield.description: Flames coat your body, providing warmth against cold and dealing fire damage to any creature that hits you with a melee attack. You gain resistance 5 to cold damage, and any creature that hits you with a melee attack takes 2d6 fire damage.

freedom_of_movement.name: Freedom of Movement
freedom_of_movement.description: The target's movement is unimpeded. The target ignores difficult terrain, is immune to the immobilized and paralyzed conditions, and can always move at full speed through any magically altered terrain or effects that slow or stop movement.

gaseous_form.name: Gaseous Form
gaseous_form.description: The target transforms into a vaporous form. It gains a fly Speed of 10 feet and can move through tight spaces. The target can't make Strikes and is immune to physical damage, but has weakness 5 to electricity and weakness 5 to wind effects.

hallucinatory_terrain.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
hallucinatory_terrain.description: You make natural terrain look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of natural terrain. The illusory terrain appears real to all senses. A creature that physically interacts with the terrain can attempt a Perception check against your spell DC to disbelieve the illusion.

mountain_resilience.name: Mountain Resilience
mountain_resilience.description: The target's skin becomes as hard as stone. The target gains resistance 5 to physical damage (except adamantine). This resistance is reduced to 0 while the target is wearing armor.

nightmare.name: Nightmare
nightmare.description: You send a terrifying dream to a creature you know by name. The target must attempt a Will save when it next falls asleep. On a failure, the target gains no benefit from sleep and is fatigued upon waking. On a critical failure, the target also takes 4d10 mental damage upon waking.

outcast_curse.name: Outcast's Curse
outcast_curse.description: You lay a curse of social isolation upon the target. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target takes a –2 status penalty to Charisma-based checks, and other creatures are unfriendly to the target unless their starting attitude would be hostile.

phantasmal_killer.name: Phantasmal Killer
phantasmal_killer.description: You create a phantasmal image of the target's greatest fear and show it to the creature. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, the target is unaffected. On a success, the target takes 2d6 mental damage. On a failure, the target takes 6d6 mental damage and is frightened 2. On a critical failure, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is frightened 4, and must attempt a Fortitude save or die.

read_omens.name: Read Omens
read_omens.description: You open your mind to omens and visions of the future. You gain a general sense of what will happen during the next day. The information is cryptic but truthful — the GM provides a vague impression of events, hazards, or opportunities ahead.

resilient_sphere.name: Resilient Sphere
resilient_sphere.description: You create an immobile, resilient sphere of force around the target. The target must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, the sphere forms around the target, trapping them inside. The sphere is immune to all damage and effects, and the creature inside can't be affected by anything outside the sphere. The creature inside can try to Escape (DC equals your spell DC).

shape_stone.name: Shape Stone
shape_stone.description: You shape a cube of stone up to 1 cubic yard in volume. You can mold it into any shape, including objects. Formed objects are functional but cannot be made to have moving parts. The stone reverts to its original shape after the duration.

solid_fog.name: Solid Fog
solid_fog.description: You call forth a billowing cloud of thick, gluelike fog that's nearly impossible to move through. The fog is difficult terrain and heavily obscures creatures within it. A creature attempting to move through the fog must spend 4 feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves.

spell_immunity.name: Spell Immunity
spell_immunity.description: You name a single spell when casting this spell. The target gains immunity to that spell until your next daily preparations. You can't name a spell of a higher rank than spell immunity's rank.

stoneskin.name: Stoneskin
stoneskin.description: The target's skin becomes rough and stone-like. The target gains resistance 5 to physical damage (except adamantine). Each time the target takes physical damage, reduce the resistance by 1 (minimum 0).

suggestion.name: Suggestion
suggestion.description: You suggest a course of action to the target. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, the target is unaffected. On a success, the target is unaffected but knows it was targeted by this spell. On a failure, the target follows the suggestion to the best of its ability for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the target follows the suggestion for 1 hour.

8.description: You can target up to 10 creatures.

translocate.name: Translocate
translocate.description: You instantly transport yourself to a clear space within range that you can see. You carry only what you can carry. If the destination space is occupied, the spell fails.

vital_beacon.name: Vital Beacon
vital_beacon.description: You radiate an aura of life force. Each time a living creature within 30 feet of you is healed, it recovers an additional 1d6 hit points. Each time you or an ally within 30 feet casts a healing spell, the healed creature regains an additional 1d6 hit points.

wall_of_fire.name: Wall of Fire
wall_of_fire.area: a straight wall up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high
wall_of_fire.description: You conjure a wall of flame that burns those who pass through it. The wall deals 4d6 fire damage to each creature that passes through it. Any creature that starts its turn adjacent to the wall takes 2d6 fire damage.

weapon_storm.name: Weapon Storm
weapon_storm.description: You swing a held weapon in a wide arc that magically replicates. All creatures in the area take 4d12 damage of the weapon's damage type with a basic Reflex save. The weapon must be a melee weapon.

banishment.name: Banishment
banishment.description: You send the target back to its home plane. The target must attempt a Will save. On a success, the spell has no effect. On a failure, the creature is banished to its home plane. On a critical failure, the creature is banished and can't return to the plane you banished it from for 1 year.

9.description: You can target any creature, not just extraplanar ones.

black_tentacles.name: Black Tentacles
black_tentacles.description: Oily black tentacles rise from the ground and writhe in the area. Each creature in the area when the spell is cast or that moves into the area must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature is grabbed by the tentacles. Each round a grabbed creature can attempt to Escape (DC equals your spell DC). Grabbed creatures take 3d6 bludgeoning damage at the start of each of their turns.

breath_of_life.name: Breath of Life
breath_of_life.targets: 1 living creature that was just reduced to 0 HP
breath_of_life.description: Your blessing restores life to a creature on the brink of death. You cast this spell as a reaction when a living creature within range would be reduced to 0 Hit Points. The target instead regains 5d8 Hit Points and is not reduced to 0 HP.

chromatic_wall.name: Chromatic Wall
chromatic_wall.area: a wall up to 60 feet long and 30 feet tall
chromatic_wall.description: You create a shimmering wall of colored light. When you cast the spell, roll 1d8 to determine the wall's color: 1 red (fire damage), 2 orange (acid damage), 3 yellow (electricity damage), 4 green (poison damage), 5 blue (cold damage), 6 indigo (petrification), 7 violet (transported to another plane), 8 roll twice. Any creature passing through the wall takes 7d8 damage of the appropriate type or is affected by the listed effect.

7.description: The wall affects two colors simultaneously (roll twice).

toxic_cloud.name: Toxic Cloud
toxic_cloud.description: You conjure a bank of thick, poisonous fog. The cloud is difficult terrain and heavily obscured. Each creature that enters or starts its turn in the cloud must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the creature takes 2d6 poison damage and is sickened 1. On a critical failure, the creature takes 4d6 poison damage and is sickened 2.

cone_of_cold.name: Cone of Cold
cone_of_cold.description: A cone of bitterly cold air shoots from your hands. Creatures in the area take 12d6 cold damage with a basic Reflex save.

control_water.name: Control Water
control_water.description: You can raise or lower water in the area, or part water to create a trench. You can raise or lower the water level by up to 20 feet. Creatures caught in rapidly rising or falling water must succeed at a Fortitude save or be swept along with the current.

wave_of_despair.name: Wave of Despair
wave_of_despair.description: You unleash a wave of crushing despair. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, the creature is unaffected. On a success, the creature is stupefied 1 for 1 round. On a failure, the creature is stupefied 2 for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the creature is stupefied 4 for 1 minute.

7.description: You can affect creatures within a 60-foot cone.

death_ward.name: Death Ward
death_ward.description: You surround the target with a protective ward against death effects. The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against death effects and negative energy. If the target would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by a death effect, it instead is reduced to 1 Hit Point and the spell ends.

drop_dead.name: Drop Dead
drop_dead.description: You create an illusion that the target has died, causing it to instantly collapse and appear dead. The target appears dead to all observers. Attackers that succeed at a Perception check vs. your Spell DC can disbelieve the illusion. The spell ends when the target takes a hostile action, at the end of 5 rounds, or if you Dismiss it.

elemental_form.name: Elemental Form
elemental_form.description: You transform into a Medium air, earth, fire, or water elemental battle form. You gain resistance 5 to the associated damage type, a speed appropriate to the form, and the attacks of that elemental. Your AC is 22, and your attack modifier is +14.

6.description: You can become a Large elemental with a +2 bonus to attack rolls.

flame_strike.name: Flame Strike
flame_strike.description: A column of divine fire descends from the heavens. Creatures in the area take 8d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. Half the damage is fire damage and half is spirit damage, so fire resistance applies to only half the damage.

hallucination.name: Hallucination
hallucination.description: The target perceives a different world than the one around it. You choose what the target senses differently—for instance, you might cause it to see an ally as an enemy or make an open field look like a forest. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, it perceives the world as you dictate for 1 hour.

6.description: You can affect up to 10 creatures.

illusory_scene.name: Illusory Scene
illusory_scene.description: You create a complex, three-dimensional illusion that fills the area. The scene can include multiple creatures, objects, sounds, smells, and other details. Creatures that study the area can attempt to disbelieve the illusion with a Perception check vs. your Spell DC.

mariners_curse.name: Mariner's Curse
mariners_curse.description: You lay a curse of the open sea upon the target. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, the target is afflicted with the mariner's curse: it gains the clumsy 1 condition and is sickened 1 whenever it is not on open water. On a critical failure, the target is clumsy 2 and sickened 2.

passwall.name: Passwall
passwall.description: You create a tunnel through a wall of wood, stone, or similar material. The tunnel is up to 10 feet wide, 10 feet tall, and 20 feet long. The passage is open for the duration; when the spell ends, the wall returns to its original state.

7.description: The tunnel can extend up to 30 feet long.

sending.name: Sending
sending.description: You project a mental message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you are familiar with on the same plane of existence. The creature can respond with a message of 25 words or fewer. The communication is instantaneous.

shadow_siphon.name: Shadow Siphon
shadow_siphon.description: You siphon the damage of a spell into shadow magic, reducing its potency. When a creature in range would take damage from a spell, you can cast Shadow Siphon to reduce that damage by half, replacing it with shadow damage instead. The remaining half damage becomes shadow damage.

subconscious_suggestion.name: Subconscious Suggestion
subconscious_suggestion.description: You implant a subconscious suggestion in the target's mind. You specify a trigger and an action up to 1 minute long. When the trigger occurs, the target follows the suggestion. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, it carries out the suggestion when triggered, believing the suggestion to be its own idea.

summon_dragon.name: Summon Dragon
summon_dragon.description: You summon a young dragon to fight alongside you. The dragon is a common dragon species and acts on your initiative. You can Command the dragon each round; if you don't, it uses the default monster actions.

6.description: You can summon an adult dragon.

truespeech.name: Truespeech
truespeech.description: You grant the target the ability to speak and understand all languages for the duration. Additionally, the target can understand and be understood by any creature that communicates through language.

tree_stride.name: Tree Stride
tree_stride.targets: 1 living tree of your size or larger
tree_stride.description: You meld into a living tree and can teleport to any other living tree of your size or larger within 5 miles. You must be familiar with the destination tree. The teleportation is instantaneous, and you emerge from the destination tree.

6.description: You can teleport to any tree you're familiar with within 50 miles.

wall_of_ice.name: Wall of Ice
wall_of_ice.description: You create a wall of ice up to 60 feet long and 10 feet tall, or a hemisphere of ice up to 20 feet in diameter. The wall has AC 10, Hardness 10, and 40 HP. A creature that passes through the wall takes 3d6 cold damage with a basic Reflex save.

wall_of_stone.name: Wall of Stone
wall_of_stone.description: You create a wall of stone up to 120 feet long and 20 feet tall, or a shorter, thicker wall. The wall is 6 inches thick and merges with surrounding stone. It has AC 10, Hardness 14, and 60 HP. The wall can be shaped, curved, or have openings.

baleful_polymorph.name: Baleful Polymorph
baleful_polymorph.description: You transform the target into a harmless animal such as a frog, mouse, or rabbit. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a critical success, it is unaffected. On a success, it is flat-footed until the end of its next turn. On a failure, it's polymorphed for 1 minute and loses access to its own abilities (including all spells) while polymorphed. On a critical failure, it becomes a Tiny animal permanently (until the spell is removed).

10.description: The target is permanently polymorphed unless the spell is removed.

blade_barrier.name: Blade Barrier
blade_barrier.area: wall up to 120 feet long and 20 feet tall
blade_barrier.description: Blades of force form a wall. Any creature moving through the wall takes 7d8 slashing damage with a basic Reflex save. On a failure, the creature is also cut and takes persistent bleed damage equal to your spellcasting modifier.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.targets: 1 creature, plus any number of secondary creatures
chain_lightning.description: You discharge a lightning bolt that arcs to multiple targets. The first target takes 8d12 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save. The bolt then arcs to the nearest creature within 30 feet of the first target; that creature also takes 8d12 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save. The bolt continues arcing until it fails to find a new target.

disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
disintegrate.description: You fire a green ray that breaks down the target at the molecular level. Make a ranged spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 12d10 force damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage. If this reduces an object to 0 HP, it is utterly destroyed. If this reduces a creature to 0 HP, the creature's body and all its possessions (except for a few fragments) are disintegrated.

dominate.name: Dominate
dominate.description: You dominate the target's mind, forcing it to obey your commands. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, it is unaffected. On a success, it is stunned 1. On a failure, it is controlled for the duration; it follows your commands (which you can give telepathically as a free action). On a critical failure, it is also flat-footed while controlled.

dragon_form.name: Dragon Form
dragon_form.description: You transform into a Large dragon battle form. You gain a fly Speed of 60 feet, resistance 10 to one energy type depending on dragon type, a breath weapon (60-foot line or 30-foot cone, 9d6 damage of the appropriate type, basic Reflex save), a +14 attack modifier, and bite (2d10+10 piercing), claw (1d10+10 slashing), and tail (1d12+10 bludgeoning) attacks.

never_mind.name: Never Mind
never_mind.description: You cause the target's mind to go blank and its mental faculties to diminish. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, it is unaffected. On a success, it is stupefied 2 for 1 round. On a failure, the target is stupefied 4 and slowed 1 for 1 minute; it might forget recent events at the GM's discretion. On a critical failure, the target is permanently stupefied 4 and the effects can only be removed with powerful magic.

field_of_life.name: Field of Life
field_of_life.description: You create an area of surging vitality. All living creatures in the area when you Cast the Spell and at the start of each of your turns gain 1d8 HP. Undead creatures in the area instead take 1d8 vitality damage (no save).

+1.description: The healing and damage increase by 1d8.

petrify.name: Petrify
petrify.description: You attempt to turn the target to stone. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a critical success, it is unaffected. On a success, it is slowed 1 for 1 round and its skin hardens. On a failure, the target is slowed 1 and must attempt a Fortitude save at the start of each of its turns; if it fails, it becomes fully petrified (a permanent condition until the spell is removed). On a critical failure, it is immediately petrified.

mislead.name: Mislead
mislead.description: You become invisible and create an illusory duplicate of yourself. The duplicate appears to be you and mimics your actions (or you can Sustain the Spell to make the duplicate take any action). The illusion can be disbelieved with a successful Perception check vs. your Spell DC. When you take a hostile action the invisibility ends, but the duplicate can persist.

phantasmal_calamity.name: Phantasmal Calamity
phantasmal_calamity.description: You create an illusory natural disaster that each creature in the area believes is real. Each creature must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, it is unaffected. On a success, it is frightened 2. On a failure, it takes 11d6 mental damage and is fleeing for 1 round. On a critical failure, it takes double damage and is fleeing for 1 minute.

purple_worm_sting.name: Purple Worm Sting
purple_worm_sting.description: Your touch delivers the venom of a purple worm. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, the target is afflicted with purple worm venom (stage 1: 3d6 poison damage and enfeebled 2; stage 2: 4d6 poison damage and enfeebled 2; stage 3: 4d6 poison damage and enfeebled 3). Each round the target must save again or progress to the next stage.

raise_dead.name: Raise Dead
raise_dead.description: You bring the target back to life. The target must have died within the last week and its soul must be willing to return. It returns to life with 1 Hit Point, is clumsy 2, drained 2, and enfeebled 2 for 1 week, and loses one spell slot of the highest rank it can cast (or one prepared spell). The material component is a diamond worth at least 100 gp.

scrying.name: Scrying
scrying.description: You peer into a magical sensor near the target. The target must attempt a Will save. On a critical success, the spell fails and the target knows you tried to scry on it. On a success, the spell fails. On a failure, you observe the creature and its surroundings as if you had darkvision. On a critical failure, the sensor is invisible to the target and you can also hear its surroundings.

spellwrack.name: Spellwrack
spellwrack.description: You lay a curse on the target that causes harmful spells to rebound. The target must attempt a Will save. On a failure, any creature that hits the target with a harmful spell also suffers the spell's effects (using the same result). This curse persists for 1 minute on a failure, or 1 hour on a critical failure.

spirit_blast.name: Spirit Blast
spirit_blast.description: You hit the target with a blast of pure force that assaults its spirit. The target takes 16d6 force damage with a basic Fortitude save. This spell affects creatures regardless of whether they have a physical body.

stone_to_flesh.name: Stone to Flesh
stone_to_flesh.targets: 1 petrified creature or 1 chunk of stone
stone_to_flesh.description: You reverse petrification, restoring a petrified creature to flesh. The creature loses the petrified condition and returns to its normal state. If you target a stone object, it becomes flesh or a fleshy substance instead.

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.targets: you and up to 4 willing creatures
teleport.description: You and your allies teleport to a location you know on the same planet. The teleportation is accurate to within 50 miles if the location is well known or if you have been there, less accurate for less familiar locations. On a success, you arrive within 1d10×10 miles of the intended destination. On a critical success, you arrive at your intended destination.

7.description: You can teleport to other planes.

8.description: You and up to 6 willing creatures can teleport.

true_seeing.name: True Seeing
true_seeing.description: You grant the target the ability to see things as they truly are. The target can see through illusions and invisibility, sees the true form of polymorphed or transmuted creatures and objects, and perceives the planes normally even if using items or spells that would modify its vision.

vampiric_exsanguination.name: Vampiric Exsanguination
vampiric_exsanguination.description: You draw the blood and life force from all creatures in the area. Each creature in the cone takes 12d6 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. You gain temporary HP equal to the amount of damage the most damaged creature takes (before applying any reductions). The temporary HP last for 1 hour.

wall_of_force.name: Wall of Force
wall_of_force.area: wall up to 50 feet long and 20 feet tall
wall_of_force.description: An invisible wall of force springs up. The wall is impervious to most attacks and can't be dispelled by most lower-level spells. Disintegrate can destroy it. Creatures can't pass through, and spells can't pass through. The wall has no effect on incorporeal creatures.

zealous_conviction.name: Zealous Conviction
zealous_conviction.description: You fill allies in the area with fanatical devotion. Willing creatures in the area gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws, and become immune to the frightened condition for the duration. However, they must attack your designated enemies if they are able.

dimensional_lock.name: Dimensional Lock
dimensional_lock.description: You create a shimmering barrier that prevents teleportation and planar travel within the area. Any attempt to teleport into or out of the area, or travel to another plane from within the area, fails automatically. This doesn't expel creatures already in the area that were teleported there.

divine_decree.name: Divine Decree
divine_decree.description: You utter a powerful divine command aligned with your deity. Choose a damage type associated with your deity's alignment (positive or negative energy). Creatures in the area with an alignment opposed to yours must attempt a Fortitude save. Critical Success: Unaffected. Success: The creature is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute. Failure: The creature takes 7d10 damage of the chosen type and is enfeebled 2 and slowed 1 for 1 minute. Critical Failure: The creature takes 14d10 damage and is banished to its home plane (if not already there), or is killed if it is on its home plane.

eclipse_burst.name: Eclipse Burst
eclipse_burst.description: A pulse of darkness and cold blasts outward from a point you designate. All creatures in the area take 8d10 cold damage with a basic Reflex save. Undead creatures treat a success as a critical success and a critical failure as a failure. In addition, creatures that fail their save are blinded until the start of your next turn (or for 1 minute on a critical failure).

energy_aegis.name: Energy Aegis
energy_aegis.description: You ward a creature against all energy types. The target gains resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, and sonic damage.

ethereal_jaunt.name: Ethereal Jaunt
ethereal_jaunt.description: You project yourself into the Ethereal Plane. You can move in any direction through solid objects and walls, but you can't affect or be affected by the material plane while ethereal. You can dismiss this spell. When the spell ends, you return to the Material Plane in the space you currently occupy or the nearest unoccupied space.

fiery_body.name: Fiery Body
fiery_body.description: You transform your body into living fire. You gain immunity to fire damage, resistance 10 to cold damage, a fly Speed of 40 feet, and you shed bright light in a 20-foot radius. Any creature that touches you or hits you with an unarmed attack takes 3d6 fire damage. Your unarmed attacks deal an additional 3d6 fire damage and have the fire trait.

finger_of_death.name: Finger of Death
finger_of_death.description: You point at the target and an invisible ray of death shoots forth. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. Critical Success: Unaffected. Success: The target takes 70 negative damage. Failure: The target takes 100 negative damage. Critical Failure: The target dies; if the target can't be killed by death effects, it instead takes 140 negative damage.

per_1.description: The damage on a success increases by 10, on a failure by 15, and on a critical failure by 20.

interplanar_teleport.name: Interplanar Teleport
interplanar_teleport.targets: you and up to 8 willing creatures touched
interplanar_teleport.description: You and your allies travel to another plane. You must have a planar focus item associated with the destination plane. The spell transports you to the destination plane, though the precise location on that plane is randomized unless you have specific knowledge of the destination. You can take up to 8 willing creatures with you by touching them during casting.

mask_of_terror.name: Mask of Terror
mask_of_terror.description: You cause the target to appear as a terrifying monster to all other creatures. Any creature that sees the target must succeed at a Will save or become frightened 2 (frightened 4 on a critical failure). Creatures that interact with the target must continue to attempt saves. The target is unaffected by this illusion.

prismatic_spray.name: Prismatic Spray
prismatic_spray.description: You spray a cone of rainbow light. Each creature in the area is struck by a random color of light, determined separately for each creature. Roll 1d8: 1 Red (fire, basic Reflex, 50 fire damage); 2 Orange (acid, basic Reflex, 60 acid damage); 3 Yellow (electricity, basic Reflex, 70 electricity damage); 4 Green (poison, basic Fortitude, 30 persistent poison damage); 5 Blue (cold, basic Reflex, 40 cold damage and slowed 1 for 1 round); 6 Indigo (Will, confused for 1 minute on failure); 7 Violet (Will, slowed 1 permanently on failure, teleported to another plane on critical failure); 8 Struck by two colors (roll twice, ignoring 8s).

project_image.name: Project Image
project_image.description: You create an illusory image of yourself at a location within range. The image looks, sounds, and smells like you, though it lacks substance. You can have your image speak and gesture, and you can perceive through the image as if you were standing at its location (gaining any senses you normally have). When you Cast a Spell, you can have it originate from the image rather than from you.

regenerate.name: Regenerate
regenerate.description: Positive energy flows through the target, granting it powerful regeneration. The target regains 15 HP at the start of each of its turns. This regeneration can be suppressed for 1 round if the creature takes fire or acid damage. The target can regrow lost limbs; a lost limb is restored after the regeneration has healed the creature for 60 HP over multiple turns.

reverse_gravity.name: Reverse Gravity
reverse_gravity.description: Gravity reverses in the area, causing creatures and objects to fall upward. When you cast this spell, creatures and objects that aren't secured to the ground fall upward. When they reach the top of the area, they are suspended there. When the spell ends, they fall down again. A creature that falls upward or down takes falling damage as normal.

spell_turning.name: Spell Turning
spell_turning.description: You create a magical shield that reflects spells back at their casters. When you are the target of a spell of rank 6 or lower, roll a d6. On a 5 or 6, the spell is reflected back at the caster, who becomes the new target. This can only trigger once per round. The spell turning is discharged after it turns a spell.

sunburst.name: Sunburst
sunburst.description: You call down a beam of brilliant sunlight. The area is filled with sunlight until the start of your next turn, which negates magical darkness of rank 7 or lower. Creatures in the area take 8d10 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. Undead, fungi, molds, and oozes treat a success as a critical success and a critical failure as a failure (extra 8d10 damage and blinded for 1 minute on a critical failure for undead).

true_target.name: True Target
true_target.duration: until the start of your next turn
true_target.description: You observe the weaknesses of your target and share that knowledge with your allies. Until the start of your next turn, you and your allies can roll twice and take the better result on all attack rolls against the target. If you or an ally makes such a roll with a fortune effect, both rolls gain that fortune effect.

warp_mind.name: Warp Mind
warp_mind.description: You scramble the target's mind. The target must attempt a Will save. Critical Success: The target is unaffected. Success: The target is confused for 1 round. Failure: The target is confused for 1 minute. Critical Failure: The target is confused for 1 minute and also stupefied 4 for 1 minute (which may persist after the confusion ends).

antimagic_field.name: Antimagic Field
antimagic_field.description: You repel all magic within a 10-foot emanation centered on you. Spells and other magical effects can't function within this area. Any magical effect that enters the area is suppressed for as long as it remains within the field. Spell slots aren't consumed for spells that are suppressed. You are also affected unless you can sustain this spell without magic.

disappearance.name: Disappearance
disappearance.description: The target becomes invisible and undetectable to all senses, including tremorsense and other precise or imprecise senses. The target doesn't become detectable if it acts, unlike with most invisibility effects. The effect ends if the target uses a hostile action against another creature.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: You shake the ground with a powerful earthquake. Creatures in the area must attempt a Reflex save at the start of their turn. Critical Success: The creature is unaffected. Success: The creature is flat-footed until the start of its next turn. Failure: The creature falls prone. Critical Failure: The creature falls prone and takes 11d6 bludgeoning damage. Structures in the area take 40 damage per round.

falling_stars.name: Falling Stars
falling_stars.description: You fill the target's mind with the terrifying vision of stars falling from the sky and crushing all life. The target must attempt a Will save. Critical Success: The target is unaffected. Success: The target is stunned 1. Failure: The target is stunned for 1 round. Critical Failure: The target is stunned for 1 minute.

horrid_wilting.name: Horrid Wilting
horrid_wilting.description: You pull the moisture from living creatures' bodies. Each living creature within range that you choose takes 10d10 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. Plant creatures and creatures made of water take a –2 circumstance penalty to their save and take 14d10 damage instead.

maze.name: Maze
maze.description: You banish the target to an extradimensional maze. The target disappears from its current location and is lost in the demiplane maze. On each of its turns, the target can use 2 actions to attempt a DC 20 Survival check. On a success, the target escapes and returns to the space it left. If the target has not escaped after 1 minute, the spell ends and the target returns.

mind_blank.name: Mind Blank
mind_blank.description: You surround the target's mind with protective mental energy. The target is immune to detection and scrying spells of rank 7 or lower, and gains a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Any magic that would read or affect the target's alignment or emotions fails automatically.

monstrosity_form.name: Monstrosity Form
monstrosity_form.description: You transform into a powerful monstrous creature. Choose from the following: purple worm, sea serpent, or phoenix.
