You gain the statistics of the chosen form, including size (Gargantuan for purple worm and sea serpent, Huge for phoenix), Speeds, attacks, and special abilities as given in the spell. You lose your own attacks and can't cast spells.

polar_ray.name: Polar Ray
polar_ray.description: You fire a ray of intense cold at the target. Make a spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 10d8 cold damage and is drained 2. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and is drained 4. The drained condition persists until the target receives appropriate healing.

prismatic_wall.name: Prismatic Wall
prismatic_wall.area: wall up to 60 feet long and 30 feet tall
prismatic_wall.description: You create a shimmering, multi-layered wall of colored light. The wall has seven layers, each corresponding to a color of the rainbow, and each with a different effect on creatures that pass through. A creature passing through is subjected to each layer's effect, from red to violet. The layers are: red (fire damage), orange (acid damage), yellow (electricity damage), green (poison damage), blue (cold damage), indigo (petrified), violet (sent to another plane).

punishing_winds.name: Punishing Winds
punishing_winds.description: You summon a powerful cyclone of punishing winds. The area is filled with howling gales. Creatures in the area treat all movement as difficult terrain. Flying creatures are knocked 20 feet in a random direction at the start of each of their turns. Creatures that are Medium or smaller must succeed at a Fortitude save at the start of their turn or be knocked prone and pushed 30 feet in a random direction.

scintillating_pattern.name: Scintillating Pattern
scintillating_pattern.description: You create a swirling pattern of dazzlingly colored lights. Creatures in the area must attempt a Will save. Critical Success: The creature is unaffected. Success: The creature is dazzled for 1 round. Failure: The creature is confused for 1d4 rounds, then stunned 1. Critical Failure: The creature is confused for 1d4 rounds, then stunned 3, then blinded for 1 minute.

uncontrollable_dance.name: Uncontrollable Dance
uncontrollable_dance.description: You compel the target to dance uncontrollably. The target must attempt a Will save. Critical Success: Unaffected. Success: The target is flat-footed for 1 round. Failure: The target must spend all its actions dancing and is flat-footed and off-guard. It can't use reactions. Critical Failure: As failure, and the target takes 2d6 bludgeoning damage at the end of each of its turns from the exertion.

unrelenting_observation.name: Unrelenting Observation
unrelenting_observation.description: You mark up to 5 creatures. You can see the exact location of each marked creature for the duration as long as they are within 1 mile of you (within 10 miles on a critical success), even through walls and other obstacles. You learn whether each creature is alive or dead. This doesn't penetrate lead or more than 10 feet of stone.

moment_of_renewal.name: Moment of Renewal
moment_of_renewal.description: You suffuse the targets with life-restoring energy. Each target regains 7d8+30 HP and you can remove one of the following conditions from each target: blinded, deafened, drained, enfeebled, paralyzed, persistent damage (one type), sickened, or slowed.

quandary.name: Quandary
quandary.description: You trap the target in an endless loop of indecision. The target must attempt a Will save. Critical Success: Unaffected. Success: The target is slowed 1 for 1 round. Failure: The target is slowed 1 for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can attempt another Will save; on a success the effect ends. Critical Failure: The target is paralyzed for the duration, repeating its Will save at the end of each turn.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: You summon a powerful whirlwind. Each creature in the area when the whirlwind forms or that enters the area must attempt a Reflex save. Critical Success: Unaffected. Success: The creature is knocked back 5 feet. Failure: The creature takes 4d12 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 10 feet and knocked prone. Critical Failure: The creature takes 8d12 bludgeoning damage and is swept up, carried 30 feet into the air and flung away, taking additional falling damage.
